Functions
create_sub_class
procedure create_sub_class(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes.fcl_id%type
)

Method to create a default entry for a new class entry. This default entry is named MASTER and is used if no sub classes are used.

Parameter
p_fcl_id
in fsm_classes.fcl_id%type

ID of the class to create a sub class for

class_has_active_transitions
function class_has_active_transitions(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes.fcl_id%type,
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type
)
return boolean

Checks whether a class/subclass configuration has active transitions and therefore requires metadata validation.

Parameters
p_fcl_id
in fsm_classes.fcl_id%type

ID of the class to inspect

p_fsc_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type

ID of the subclass to inspect

Returns

TRUE if active transitions exist for the given class/subclass

check_metadata_if_needed
procedure check_metadata_if_needed(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes.fcl_id%type,
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_sub_classes.fsc_id%type
 default 
'MASTER'
)

Triggers metadata validation only if the class/subclass configuration already contains active transitions.

Parameters
p_fcl_id
in fsm_classes.fcl_id%type

ID of the class to inspect

p_fsc_id
in fsm_sub_classes.fsc_id%type

ID of the subclass to inspect

check_metadata_for_class
procedure check_metadata_for_class(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes.fcl_id%type
)

Triggers metadata validation for all subclasses of a class that already contain active transitions.

Parameters
p_fcl_id
in fsm_classes.fcl_id%type

ID of the class to inspect

report_multiple_auto_events
procedure report_multiple_auto_events(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type,
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type
)

Reports invalid metadata if more than one automatic event is defined for the same status/subclass/result-status combination.

Parameters
p_fcl_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type

ID of the class to inspect

p_fsc_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type

ID of the subclass to inspect

check_initial_statuses
procedure check_initial_statuses(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type,
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type
)

Ensures that exactly one initial status exists for the given class/subclass configuration.

Parameters
p_fcl_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type

ID of the class to inspect

p_fsc_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type

ID of the subclass to inspect

report_unreachable_statuses
procedure report_unreachable_statuses(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type,
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type
)

Reports active statuses that cannot be reached from the configured initial status within the given class/subclass configuration.

Parameters
p_fcl_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type

ID of the class to inspect

p_fsc_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type

ID of the subclass to inspect

report_dead_ends
procedure report_dead_ends(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type,
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type
)

Reports reachable, non-terminal statuses that do not have an active outgoing transition within the given class/subclass configuration.

Parameters
p_fcl_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type

ID of the class to inspect

p_fsc_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type

ID of the subclass to inspect

create_constant_package_for
procedure create_constant_package_for(
p_pkg_name 
in varchar2
)

Generates and compiles a constant package from the configured UTL_TEXT templates. Depending on the requested package name, constants for all active events or all active statuses are emitted.

Parameters
p_pkg_name
in varchar2

Name of the package to generate, supported values are FSM_FEV and FSM_FST

merge_class
procedure merge_class(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_id%type,
p_fcl_type_name 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_type_name%type,
p_fcl_name 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_name%type,
p_fcl_description 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_description%type,
p_fcl_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

See <FSM_ADMIN.merge_class>

delete_class
procedure delete_class(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_id%type,
p_force 
in boolean
 default 
false
)

See <FSM_ADMIN.delete_class>

procedure merge_sub_class(

in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_id%type,
p_fsc_fcl_id

p_fsc_name 
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_name%type,
p_fsc_description 
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_description%type,
p_fsc_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

p_row 
fsm_sub_classes_v%rowtype
)

merge_status_group
procedure merge_status_group(
p_fsg_id 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_id%type,
p_fsg_fcl_id 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_fcl_id%type,
p_fsg_name 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_name%type,
p_fsg_description 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_description%type,
p_fsg_icon_css 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_icon_css%type
 default 
null,
p_fsg_name_css 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_name_css%type
 default 
null,
p_fsg_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

See <FSM_ADMIN.merge_status_group>

p_fss_id 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_id%type,

p_fss_html 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_html%type,

in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_icon%type
)

)

merge_status
procedure merge_status(
p_fst_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_id%type,
p_fst_fcl_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_fcl_id%type,
p_fst_fsg_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_fsg_id%type,
p_fst_name 
in fsm_status_v.fst_name%type,
p_fst_description 
in fsm_status_v.fst_description%type,
p_fst_severity 
in fsm_status_v.fst_severity%type,
p_fst_msg_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_msg_id%type
 default 
msg.FSM_STATUS_CHANGED,
p_fst_retries_on_error 
in fsm_status_v.fst_retries_on_error%type
 default 
0,
p_fst_retry_schedule 
in fsm_status_v.fst_retry_schedule%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_retry_time 
in fsm_status_v.fst_retry_time%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_warn_interval 
in fsm_status_v.fst_warn_interval%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_alert_interval 
in fsm_status_v.fst_alert_interval%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_escalation_basis 
in fsm_status_v.fst_escalation_basis%type
 default 
'STATUS',
p_fst_icon_css 
in fsm_status_v.fst_icon_css%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_name_css 
in fsm_status_v.fst_name_css%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_initial_status 
in boolean
 default 
false,
p_fst_terminal_status 
in boolean
 default 
false,
p_fst_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

See <FSM_ADMIN.merge_status>

delete_status
procedure delete_status(
p_fst_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_id%type,

p_force 
in boolean
 default 
false
)

merge_event
procedure merge_event(
p_fev_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_id%type,
p_fev_fcl_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_fcl_id%type,
p_fev_name 
in fsm_events_v.fev_name%type,
p_fev_description 
in fsm_events_v.fev_description%type,
p_fev_msg_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_msg_id%type
 default 
msg.FSM_EVENT_RAISED,
p_fev_raised_by_user 
in boolean
 default 
false,
p_fev_command_label 
in fsm_events_v.fev_command_label%type
 default 
null,
p_fev_button_icon 
in fsm_events_v.fev_button_icon%type
 default 
null,
p_fev_button_highlight 
in boolean
 default 
false,
p_fev_confirm_message 
in fsm_events_v.fev_confirm_message%type
 default 
null,
p_fev_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

See <FSM_ADMIN.merge_event>

delete_event
procedure delete_event(
p_fev_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_id%type,
p_fev_fcl_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_fcl_id%type,
p_force 
in boolean
 default 
false
)

merge_transition
procedure merge_transition(
p_ftr_fst_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fst_id%type,
p_ftr_fev_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fev_id%type,
p_ftr_fcl_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fcl_id%type,
p_ftr_fsc_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fsc_id%type
 default 
'MASTER',
p_ftr_fst_list 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fst_list%type,
p_ftr_raise_automatically 
in boolean,
p_ftr_raise_on_status 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_raise_on_status%type
 default 
fsm.C_OK,
p_ftr_required_role 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_required_role%type
 default 
null,
p_ftr_active 
in boolean
 default 
true,
p_run_checks 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

See <FSM_ADMIN.merge_transition>

delete_transition
procedure delete_transition(
p_ftr_fst_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fst_id%type,
p_ftr_fev_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fev_id%type,

in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fcl_id%type,
p_ftr_fsc_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fsc_id%type
 default 
'MASTER'
)

export_class
function export_class(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_id%type
)
return clob
